title: Ugramm
desc: Agastya, an automobile mechanic with a dangerous past, takes it upon himself to protect Nithya, a kidnapped girl, from the vengeful son of a ruthless gangster.

title: Jaguar
desc: Krishna, an orphan medical student, lives a seemingly ordinary life. However, unbeknownst to people, he is a vigilante named Jaguar who pursues a certain group of people in order to kill them.

title: Yuddha Kaanda
desc: A corrupt advocate falsely accuses a commoner of murder and sends him to the gallows. Eventually, the commoner's son becomes a lawyer and embarks on a quest for revenge.

title: Randhawa
desc: A photographer named Robert travels to a remote village to investigate strange recurring dreams he has been having. Soon, he discovers a link between himself and a legendary king.

title: Maurya
desc: Manu, a kick-boxer must train and win an upcoming tournament to fulfill his mother's wishes and to become the best in the world.
